utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: What does XX want, want to do now?
utterances.verbalization: What does XX want, want to do now?

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Want to do a big makeover.
utterances.verbalization: Want to do a big makeover.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: XX, you want to do a big makeover?
utterances.verbalization: XX, you want to do a big makeover?

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Mhm, where should we start first?
utterances.verbalization: Mhm, where should we start first?

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Whatever you want to do, I'll do it with you.
utterances.verbalization: Whatever you want to do, I'll do it with you.

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Yeah, because I can't think of anything.
utterances.verbalization: Yeah, because I can't think of anything.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Mhm, everything XX does is great.
utterances.verbalization: Mhm, everything XX does is great.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Oh, you found—XX found a toilet.
utterances.verbalization: Oh, you found—XX found a toilet.

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Hey, I don't think we need to do a big makeover.
utterances.verbalization: Hey, I don't think we need to do a big makeover.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Mhm, XX, what you're holding is that...
utterances.verbalization: Mhm, XX, what you're holding is that...

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: It's some, some kind of... some, that simulator...
utterances.verbalization: It's some, some kind of... some, that simulator...

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Hmm, how come there isn't one?
utterances.verbalization: Hmm, how come there isn't one?

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Is what XX got a... fishing rod?
utterances.verbalization: Is what XX got a... fishing rod?

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: What XX got is a fishing rod.
utterances.verbalization: What XX got is a fishing rod.

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Okay, and then someone has to hold this one.
utterances.verbalization: Okay, and then someone has to hold this one.

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: And then I also want to get the fish.
utterances.verbalization: And then I also want to get the fish.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Hey, XX, you found a picnic mat!
utterances.verbalization: Hey, XX, you found a picnic mat!

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: XX is spreading the picnic mat on the grass.
utterances.verbalization: XX is spreading the picnic mat on the grass.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: And red and green, you matched them really nicely!
utterances.verbalization: And red and green, you matched them really nicely!

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Wow, XX, you put the Lego figure on the picnic mat.
utterances.verbalization: Wow, XX, you put the Lego figure on the picnic mat.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Oh, I'm putting a puppy here.
utterances.verbalization: Oh, I'm putting a puppy here.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: You clipped the puppy's leash onto Lego sister.
utterances.verbalization: You clipped the puppy's leash onto Lego sister.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Hey, you put Lego sister on the grass.
utterances.verbalization: Hey, you put Lego sister on the grass.

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: Wow, so is this part built like this?
utterances.verbalization: Wow, so is this part built like this?

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Your, your decisions are all good.
utterances.verbalization: Your, your decisions are all good.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Wow, you also put a Lego grandpa next to the blue baseplate.
utterances.verbalization: Wow, you also put a Lego grandpa next to the blue baseplate.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Oh, XX, you put, clipped that fishing rod onto the block grandpa.
utterances.verbalization: Oh, XX, you put, clipped that fishing rod onto the block grandpa.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Ah, then sitting in the lake...
utterances.verbalization: Ah, then sitting in the lake...

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: XX, you're using the blue baseplate as a lake now.
utterances.verbalization: XX, you're using the blue baseplate as a lake now.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: And building it into a lake, right?
utterances.verbalization: And building it into a lake, right?

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Wow, this design of yours, the one XX designed is really pretty.
utterances.verbalization: Wow, this design of yours, the one XX designed is really pretty.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: Oh, grandpa is by the lake, XX is having grandpa fish by the lake.
utterances.verbalization: Oh, grandpa is by the lake, XX is having grandpa fish by the lake.

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: XX found, found a piece of bread.
utterances.verbalization: XX found, found a piece of bread.

utterances.speaker: child
utterances.text: And then, a whole bunch of oranges.
utterances.verbalization: And then, a whole bunch of oranges.

utterances.text: Look, I found, found some corn!
utterances.verbalization: Look, I found, found some corn!

utterances.speaker: parent
utterances.text: We can let big sister and them eat it together at a picnic.
